summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Homepage map section, Auth system (register/login/logout), Favorites system (save/view/remove). All 21 features tested successfully. Backend APIs 16/16 passed, Frontend UI tests all passed.

passed: TEST 1: Homepage map section heading 'Explore Property Opportunities' visible
TEST 2: Map container visible on homepage with 1,791 property markers
TEST 3: Property count shows '1,791 properties found'
TEST 4: Search bar visible and functional
TEST 5: Search filtering works - 'Madrid' returns 64 properties
TEST 6: Filter toggle opens filters panel
TEST 7: Region filter dropdown visible
TEST 8: Price filter dropdown visible
TEST 9: Price filter 'Under 50K' applied correctly - shows 44 properties
TEST 10: Navbar 'Opportunities' link visible
TEST 11: Login button visible in navbar for non-logged users
TEST 12: Login button click opens Auth Modal
TEST 13: Auth modal displays correctly
TEST 14: 'Continue with Google' OAuth button visible
TEST 15: Email and password fields visible in auth form
TEST 16: Switch mode button toggles between login/register
TEST 17: Registration with email/password works - POST /api/auth/register
TEST 18: After login, user menu (avatar) shows instead of Login button
TEST 19: Clicking heart on property popup saves to favorites (POST /api/favorites/{id})
TEST 20: Favorites page shows saved properties with WhatsApp button
TEST 21: Remove button on favorites page works
TEST 22: User menu dropdown shows Favorites link and Logout
TEST 23: Logout works - clears session, shows Login button again
TEST 24: /favorites without login shows login prompt

homepage_map_section.details: Map visible on homepage with heading, 1,791 markers in clusters, search/filters functional

auth_modal.details: Login/Register modes, email+password form, Google OAuth button, form validation

registration.details: POST /api/auth/register creates user, sets session cookie

login.details: POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, sets session cookie

google_oauth.details: Button visible, redirects to auth.emergentagent.com - full OAuth flow not testable (external provider)

favorites_save.details: Heart button in property popup saves to favorites for logged users

favorites_page.details: /favorites shows saved properties with WhatsApp button and remove option

logout.details: Clears session, returns to logged-out state

non_auth_favorites.details: /favorites without login shows 'Sign in to view your favorites' prompt

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created via API during testing (test_ui_*, fav_test_*, fav_page_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new auth and favorites features working. Auth uses httpOnly session cookies. Favorites stored in MongoDB 'favorites' collection. WhatsApp number is 34673365300. Map uses Leaflet with react-leaflet-cluster. Cookie banner appears on first visit - dismiss with 'Accept All'. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com - external flow not fully testable.
